title: Under The Blossom Shade

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Underneath the shade of apple trees,
You find me waiting, soft breeze, sweet sighs.
My beloved, like a lily among the thorns,
You stand apart, in beauty, in pride.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Rise, my love, come away with me,
For the winter is past, flowers bloom free.
The rain has stopped, the time is right,
For love to dance in the golden light.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Come, my love, my dove, my perfect one,
The season of singing has begun.
Let’s run to the hills, where the shadows fade,
Under the blossom shade, our love is made.
Under the blossom shade, our love is made.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: I hear your voice through the lattice fair,
Calling me softly, tender and bare.
You are my deer on the mountainside,
Through valleys deep, with you I reside.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Hold me close till the break of dawn,
Let not love be awakened until it’s strong.
For we are bound by a silver thread,
Under the stars, where our vows are said.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Come, my love, my dove, my perfect one,
The season of singing has begun.
Let’s run to the hills, where the shadows fade,
Under the blossom shade, our love is made.
Under the blossom shade, our love is made.

sections.label: Outro
lines: Under the blossom, our hearts find rest,
In your arms, I know I’m blessed.
Come, my love, and stay with me,
Till eternity.

epigraph: so is my beloved among the sons. I sat down under his shadow with great
lyricEyebrow: From the Book of Song of Songs
